---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

One-line description of the feature you'd like.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? Who is affected and how often?

## Proposed Solution

How you imagine the feature working. Be as specific as helpful.

## Alternatives Considered

What alternatives or workarounds have you tried or thought about?

## Additional Context

Links, screenshots, examples, or any other relevant context.

---

> **Note:** Aria is a solo-developer showcase project. Feature requests are tracked but not all will be implemented. Feel free to open a PR if you'd like to contribute!
